title: Stratejik Araştırmalar Uygulama ve Araştırma Merkezi ÜSSAM (Stratejik Araştırmalar Uygulama ve Araştırma Merkezi) Seminerler
content:
We invite you, our esteemed students and followers, to our program titled Current Issues in the Middle East from the American Perspective, organized by Üsküdar University Center for Strategic Studies, with

Assoc. Prof. Dr. Uğur Yasin Asal

as the guest speaker.
